global.description: The ad features a vibrant teal background with bold text and abstract shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting travel bookings with a special offer.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A solid teal background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping abstract shapes, one oval and one rectangle, are centered in the ad, outlined in a light color.

elements.label: Main text message
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Book your next trip' is prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Subtext
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main message reads 'Special fares today', providing additional information.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A bright yellow button with the text 'Try for free' invites user interaction, positioned below the main text.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A smaller oval shape is positioned to the left of the main text, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Additional rectangle
elements.description: A larger rectangle shape is positioned behind the main text, enhancing the layout.

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The logo 'DriftPass' is displayed in the top left corner, in a bold font against the teal background.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' is positioned in the top right corner, drawing attention.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, unidentifiable element is located towards the bottom left of the ad.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: Another small, unidentifiable element is positioned near the bottom left, slightly overlapping the previous element.

elements.label: Bottom area
elements.description: The bottom area of the ad is filled with a lighter shade of teal, creating a visual separation.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Try for free

elements.label: DriftPass logo
elements.description: The logo 'DriftPass' appears prominently at the top, styled in a modern font.

elements.label: Sale indicator
elements.description: A small, bright yellow 'SALE' text is displayed in the top right corner, indicating a promotion.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, promoting travel bookings.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top left, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Book your next trip, Special fares today, Try for free, DriftPass, SALE
